comment: Did my sectional and ottoman and left it like new. I'm very satisfied with the work done and would recommend to anyone looking to get their couch cleaned.
Did a great job with my carpet and upholstery.
He cleaned all of my 15 windows and also came back to do touch ups on a few of the higher windows.
I recently hired Nigel for carpet cleaning, and I am really impressed with the results. The team was professional, arrived on time, and explained the whole process clearly before getting started
